datasets.name: ds_stream_overview
datasets.query:
WITH latest_batch AS (
  SELECT
    details:stream_progress.id::STRING AS query_id,
    details:stream_progress.name::STRING AS query_name,
    MAX(timestamp) AS last_batch_ts,
    MAX(details:stream_progress.batchId::BIGINT) AS last_batch_id,
    MIN(timestamp) AS first_batch_ts
  FROM streaming_metrics
  WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
  GROUP BY details:stream_progress.id::STRING, details:stream_progress.name::STRING
),
error_status AS (
  SELECT query_id, MAX(timestamp) AS last_error_ts
  FROM stream_errors
  WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
  GROUP BY query_id
),
sla_breaches AS (
  SELECT query_id, COUNT(*) AS breach_count
  FROM sla_latency_metrics
  WHERE sla_breach_flag = true
    AND CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
  GROUP BY query_id
)
SELECT
  lb.query_name,
  CASE
    WHEN es.last_error_ts > lb.last_batch_ts THEN 'ERROR'
    WHEN lb.last_batch_ts < current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE THEN 'INACTIVE'
    ELSE 'ACTIVE'
  END AS stream_status,
  lb.last_batch_ts,
  lb.last_batch_id,
  CAST((unix_timestamp(lb.last_batch_ts) - unix_timestamp(lb.first_batch_ts)) / 3600.0 AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS uptime_hours,
  COALESCE(sb.breach_count, 0) AS sla_breach_count,
  es.last_error_ts
FROM latest_batch lb
LEFT JOIN error_status es ON lb.query_id = es.query_id
LEFT JOIN sla_breaches sb ON lb.query_id = sb.query_id
ORDER BY lb.query_name

datasets.name: ds_throughput_trends
datasets.query:
SELECT
  details:stream_progress.name::STRING AS query_name,
  date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp) AS time_bucket,
  ROUND(AVG(details:stream_progress.inputRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE), 2) AS avg_input_rows_per_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(details:stream_progress.processedRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE), 2) AS avg_processed_rows_per_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(details:stream_progress.batchDuration::BIGINT), 0) AS avg_batch_duration_ms,
  MAX(details:stream_progress.batchDuration::BIGINT) AS max_batch_duration_ms,
  SUM(details:stream_progress.numInputRows::BIGINT) AS total_input_rows,
  COUNT(*) AS batch_count
FROM streaming_metrics
WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
GROUP BY details:stream_progress.name::STRING, date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp)
ORDER BY query_name, time_bucket

datasets.name: ds_latency_sla
datasets.query:
SELECT
  query_name,
  date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp) AS time_bucket,
  PERCENTILE_APPROX(latency_ms, 0.50) AS p50_latency_ms,
  PERCENTILE_APPROX(latency_ms, 0.90) AS p90_latency_ms,
  PERCENTILE_APPROX(latency_ms, 0.99) AS p99_latency_ms,
  MAX(max_latency) AS max_latency_ms,
  COUNT(*) AS batch_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sla_breach_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS breach_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN sla_breach_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS breach_percentage
FROM sla_latency_metrics
WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY query_name, date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp)
ORDER BY query_name, time_bucket

datasets.name: ds_backpressure
datasets.query:
WITH batch_ratios AS (
  SELECT
    details:stream_progress.id::STRING AS query_id,
    details:stream_progress.name::STRING AS query_name,
    details:stream_progress.batchId::BIGINT AS batch_id,
    timestamp,
    ROUND(details:stream_progress.inputRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE, 2) AS input_rows_per_second,
    ROUND(details:stream_progress.processedRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE, 2) AS processed_rows_per_second,
    CASE
      WHEN details:stream_progress.processedRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE > 0
      THEN ROUND(details:stream_progress.inputRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE / details:stream_progress.processedRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE, 3)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS backpressure_ratio,
    CASE
      WHEN details:stream_progress.inputRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE > details:stream_progress.processedRowsPerSecond::DOUBLE THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_backpressured
  FROM streaming_metrics
  WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
),
windowed AS (
  SELECT *,
    SUM(is_backpressured) OVER (PARTITION BY query_id ORDER BY batch_id ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS sustained_count
  FROM batch_ratios
)
SELECT
  query_name, batch_id, timestamp,
  input_rows_per_second, processed_rows_per_second,
  backpressure_ratio, sustained_count,
  CASE WHEN sustained_count >= 5 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN sustained_count >= 3 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'OK' END AS backpressure_status
FROM windowed
ORDER BY query_name, batch_id DESC

datasets.name: ds_state_store
datasets.query:
WITH state_data AS (
  SELECT
    details:stream_progress.name::STRING AS query_name,
    details:stream_progress.id::STRING AS query_id,
    date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp) AS time_bucket,
    MAX(AGGREGATE(from_json(details:stream_progress.stateOperators, 'ARRAY<STRUCT<memoryUsedBytes:BIGINT, numRowsTotal:BIGINT>>'), CAST(0 AS BIGINT), (acc, x) -> acc + COALESCE(x.memoryUsedBytes, 0))) AS state_memory_bytes,
    MAX(AGGREGATE(from_json(details:stream_progress.stateOperators, 'ARRAY<STRUCT<memoryUsedBytes:BIGINT, numRowsTotal:BIGINT>>'), CAST(0 AS BIGINT), (acc, x) -> acc + COALESCE(x.numRowsTotal, 0))) AS state_rows_total
  FROM streaming_metrics
  WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
  GROUP BY details:stream_progress.name::STRING, details:stream_progress.id::STRING, date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp)
)
SELECT
  query_name, time_bucket,
  ROUND(state_memory_bytes / (1024.0 * 1024.0), 2) AS state_memory_mb,
  state_rows_total
FROM state_data
WHERE state_memory_bytes > 0
ORDER BY query_name, time_bucket

datasets.name: ds_data_quality
datasets.query:
SELECT
  query_name,
  date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp) AS time_bucket,
  ROUND(AVG(duplicate_rate) * 100, 2) AS avg_duplicate_rate_pct,
  SUM(dropped_record_count) AS total_dropped_records,
  ROUND(AVG(late_record_percentage) * 100, 2) AS avg_late_record_pct,
  SUM(CASE WHEN schema_change_detected THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS schema_change_count,
  COUNT(*) AS batch_count
FROM data_quality_metrics
WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
GROUP BY query_name, date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp)
ORDER BY query_name, time_bucket

datasets.name: ds_infrastructure
datasets.query:
SELECT
  cluster_id,
  date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp) AS time_bucket,
  ROUND(AVG(cpu_usage_percent), 1) AS avg_cpu_pct,
  MAX(cpu_usage_percent) AS max_cpu_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(memory_usage_percent), 1) AS avg_memory_pct,
  MAX(memory_usage_percent) AS max_memory_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(executor_count), 0) AS avg_executor_count,
  MAX(executor_count) AS max_executor_count,
  ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(dbu_consumption, 0)), 2) AS total_dbu,
  SUM(CASE WHEN autoscaling_event = 'SCALE_UP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scale_up_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN autoscaling_event = 'SCALE_DOWN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scale_down_count
FROM infrastructure_metrics
WHERE CAST(timestamp AS DATE) >= current_date() - MAKE_INTERVAL(0, 0, 0, :time_range_days)
GROUP BY cluster_id, date_trunc('HOUR', timestamp)
ORDER BY cluster_id, time_bucket
